input.query_context: Validate runtime truth for a standard guided deployment

why_it_matters: Users and developers need runtime truth to diagnose capability gaps and fallback behavior without reading internal logs.

input.query_context: Validate that deterministic fallback is visible when the configured smart provider does not remain active

why_it_matters: A silent smart-provider fallback undermines trust in planner and synthesis quality, so runtime diagnostics must make it explicit.
notes: Good slice for configured-versus-active provider truth.

input.query_context: Validate runtime reporting for embedding availability and support-matrix honesty

why_it_matters: Supporting-role evaluation depends on knowing whether embeddings are actually in play or whether lexical fallback is active.

input.query_context: Validate that hidden-tool behavior is reported when guided profile hides expert tools

why_it_matters: Low-context users should still be able to understand why some capabilities are not visible from the current profile.
notes: Tied to the guided-first product contract.

input.query_context: Validate that provider-set reporting stays internally consistent across top-level runtime fields

why_it_matters: Ops and debugging workflows depend on top-level provider truth matching the underlying provider rows.
